English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Development and Alumni Affairs records
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Development and Alumni Affairs
21-2-1767
10.4 cubic feet.
1900-2004 Minutes, correspondence, audiocassettes Records of the Cornell College of Agriculture's Development and Alumni Affairs office include correspondence, proposals, minutes, reports, donor lists, accounts, date books, and other materials relating to corporate and alumni gifts, scholarships, the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences Fund, and other subjects. Names included are Laing E. Kennedy, A. Lee Thompson, William I. Myers, Lansing P. Shield, W. Keith Kennedy, A. Bradford Carruth, Wendell G. Earle, and Elmer L. Townsend. Includes photographs and slides of various events and people, such as David Call and of campus buildings, including the demolition of Roberts Hall in 1990. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 ======= 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2074835
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Corey Ryan Earle, Nov. 2005
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of the Cornell College of Agriculture's Development and Alumni Affairs office include correspondence, proposals, minutes, reports, donor lists, accounts, date books, and other materials relating to corporate and alumni gifts, scholarships, the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences Fund, and other subjects. Names included are Laing E. Kennedy, A. Lee Thompson, William I. Myers, Lansing P. Shield, W. Keith Kennedy, A. Bradford Carruth, Wendell G. Earle, and Elmer L. Townsend. Includes photographs and slides of various events and people, such as David Call and of campus buildings, including the demolition of Roberts Hall in 1990. Collection also includes photographs, chiefly of CALS events from the early 1980s until 2004. Events include reunions, award banquets, Dean-Alumni Get Togethers, and conferences.
Cite As:
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Development and Alumni Affairs records, #21-2-1767. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Slides (photographs). Educational fund raising. Call, David L., 1932- Carruth, A. Bradford. Earle, Wendell, 1923- Kennedy, Laing E. Kennedy, Wilbert Keith, 1919- Myers, William Irving, 1891-1976. Shield, Lansing P. Thompson, A. Lee. Townsend, Elmer L. Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae. Cornell University -- : Buildings Roberts Hall (New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences) New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Alumni and alumnae. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Endowments. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Funds and scholarships. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Finance.

Myers Professorship Solicitation Letters,Apr. 197931William I. Myers Papers,197632William I. Myers Prospects, Action,1977-197933William I. Myers Professorship,1977-197834Requests for Pledges to William I. Myers Professorship,197735William I. Myers Professorship Correspondence,1973-197836William I. Myers Professorship Booklets36bWendell G. Earle Testimonial Dinner Correspondence,197537Wendell G. Earle Testimonial Dinner Menu, Programs, Photograph,197538Photographs1900-2004
Scope and Contents
Photographs chiefly taken at CALS events from the early 1980s until 2004. Events include Dean-Alumni Get-Togethers, reunions, commencements, and award banquets.
Arrangement
Arranged chronologically.
Processing Information
Two photo albums were rehoused into two boxes in box 10.Undated UndatedCampus Buildings - photos325Campus Buildings - slides326Campus Buildings - slides327Campus Buildings - slides328David Call's Portrait Unveiling312Dean Beverly Galloway's Portrait - CALS Alumni Assocation Meeting - photos,1980315"Herakles at Ithaca" Dedication - Jason Seley - photos329Isaac Roberts, Dean - photo320Keith Kennedy - photos and slides316NegativesUndated4 1Wendell G. Myers Professorship Booklets36bWendell G. Earle Testimonial Dinner Correspondence,197537Wendell G. Earle Testimonial Dinner Menu, Programs, Photograph,197538Photographs1900-2004
Scope and Contents
Photographs chiefly taken at CALS events from the early 1980s until 2004. Events include Dean-Alumni Get-Togethers, reunions, commencements, and award banquets.
Arrangement
Arranged chronologically.
Processing Information
Two photo albums were rehoused into two boxes in box 10.Undated UndatedCampus Buildings - photos325Campus Buildings - slides326Campus Buildings - slides327Campus Buildings - slides328David Call's Portrait Unveiling312Dean Beverly Galloway's Portrait - CALS Alumni Assocation Meeting - photos,1980315"Herakles at Ithaca" Dedication - Jason Seley - photos329Isaac Roberts, Dean - photo320Keith Kennedy - photos and slides316NegativesUndated4 1Wendell G.
